reviews.comment:
Un solo empleado. Se fue al baño, nos dejó esperando y no volvió más. De por sí había una sección en reparación y un solo surtidor funcionando.

(Translated by Google)
Only one employee. He went to the bathroom, left us waiting, and never came back. There was already a section under repair and only one pump working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNHIyZzNnRRAB

Good place, it's busy but they're quick to serve you

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención desde el de seguridad que con malos modos te dice donde ir hasta los playeros que muy de mala gana cargan combustible, quería controlar el refigerante y me mandaron afuera. Soy socia del ACA hace más de 15 años y no dan ganas de ir a esa estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, from the rude security guard who tells you where to go to the attendants who reluctantly pump the fuel. I wanted to check my coolant and they sent me outside. I've been an ACA member for over 15 years and I have no desire to go to that gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocDd2WWRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Para cuando terminaran las obras? Voy por el descuento con el ACA, pero ya aburre el desorden y la remodelación que no terminan nunca.

(Translated by Google)
When will the construction be finished? I'm going for the discount with the ACA, but the mess and the never-ending renovations are getting tiresome.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaTdXX25BRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's an ACA service station, so you get a discount on fuel if you're a member.

reviews.comment:
Buena y rápida atención. Tiene un amplio acceso por lo que se evita tener que hacer colar sobre la avenida provocado problemas en el tránsito. Es muy cómodo que ser pueda hacer el pago usando la aplicación ya que te vincula los puntos de ServiClub de forma automática.

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service. It has ample access, so you don't have to queue on the avenue, which causes traffic problems. It's very convenient that you can pay using the app, as it automatically links your ServiClub points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobVlEeE93EAE

reviews.comment:
Son lentos. Pero atentos con el cliente. YPF / ACA. Así que hay cola (sobre Av. Cabildo) hasta el sábado a las 6.00 a.m. Atención con eso.

(Translated by Google)
They're slow. But they're attentive to customers. YPF / ACA. So there's a line (on Av. Cabildo) until Saturday at 6:00 a.m. Be aware of that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoX28tSUhnEAE
